description: Backend data contract for Anomalies / Security Alerts page – provides statistics, anomaly list with filters, and status update capabilities.

getStats.description: Get KPI statistics for anomalies dashboard.

getAnomalies.description: Fetch paginated list of anomalies with filters. Frontend uses infinite scroll or pagination; here we assume page/limit.

queryParams.search: string (optional, searches student name, studentId, description, anomalyId)
queryParams.sortBy: string (optional, default time desc, e.g., time, severity)

anomalies.type: enum: duplicate_scan, unknown_card, outside_hours, multiple_exits, suspicious_timing

student.name: string
student.avatarColor: string (optional, backend may not store; frontend computes from type/severity)

anomalies.description: QR card scanned twice within 4 minutes at two different gates

getAnomalyById.description: Get full details of a single anomaly (for detail panel). Response is same as item in anomalies array.

updateAnomalyStatus.description: Update the status of an anomaly (open → investigating → resolved).

getFilterOptions.description: Get available filter values for dropdowns and tabs (statuses, severities, types) based on existing data.

exportAnomalies.description: Export filtered anomalies as CSV (same query params as getAnomalies but without pagination).
exportAnomalies.response: CSV file download with columns: id, type, severity, status, studentName, studentId, class, description, location, time, detectedBy

fieldNotes.avatarColor: Frontend calculates color based on type, severity, or student initials. Backend does not need to store this.
fieldNotes.time: ISO 8601 datetime. Frontend converts to relative time (e.g., '2h ago') and full locale string.
fieldNotes.student.avatarInitials: Can be computed by backend or frontend; either is fine.
